metadata.scenario: A woman calls for the first time asking about in-home physical therapy for her elderly father. She asks about pricing and availability. The receptionist provides a quote for three visits per week. The caller sounds relieved and says she'll call back to confirm. First-time caller, prospect.

transcription.text: Thank you for calling CareFirst Home Health, this is Margaret speaking. How can I help you today? Hi, my name is Agnes Rodriguez. I’m calling to inquire about in-home physical therapy for my father. Of course, Agnes. I’d be happy to assist you with that. Can I ask how old your father is? He’s 78 and has been having some trouble with mobility after his recent surgery. I see. We can definitely help with that. Our physical therapy services are tailored for individuals recovering from surgeries. That’s good to know. What’s the pricing like for those services? Our physical therapy sessions range from $110 to $140 for a 45 to 60-minute visit. Okay, and how often would you recommend? Typically, we recommend three visits per week for the best results. That would total between $330 and $420 per week. Alright, that sounds reasonable. What’s the availability like? Our physical therapist, Dr. James Rodriguez, is available Monday through Friday. We can schedule a time that works for you. That’s great! I’ll need to discuss it with my family first. Absolutely, take your time. Would you like me to hold your information for a follow-up? Yes, please. I want to make sure we can get started soon. Sure! Could I have your father’s full name and any specific days you prefer for the sessions? His name is John Rodriguez, and I think Tuesday and Thursday would work best. Perfect, I’ll note that down. Would you also like information on transportation services if needed? That could be helpful, yes. Great! I can follow up with an email summarizing everything we discussed, including the transportation options. That sounds wonderful. Thank you so much for your help! You’re very welcome, Agnes! Just give us a call back when you’re ready to proceed. I will do that. Have a great day! You too! Thank you for calling CareFirst Home Health.
